title: BENECREAT 10PCS 12x12x12cm Clear Cube Wedding Favour Boxes with Protective Film, Large PVC Transparent Square Gift Boxes for Party Gift Candy Birthday Cake
features: [Package Content]: 10pcs cube Valentine's Day gift boxes in total, 12x12x12cm square after assembled, HD transparent, big gift boxes suitable for Valentine's Day gift decor or festival decor. There is a protective film on the surface of the box, which can prevent the box from being scratched during transportation and storage
[Easy to Assemble]: Original boxes are flat but it easy to assemble, folding along the line is easier and more convenient, no glue required.
[DIY Your Box]: Can be decorated with colored ribbon, flowers or affix to personalized labels, stickers or charms to match your wedding or Valentine's Day theme decoration.
[Material]: Made of high quality transparent PVC, so that the large transparent gift box has a fine flexibility and keep clear.

[Usage]: Great for candies, cupcakes, cookies, chocolate, sweets, candles, and Xmas gifts, baubles, other engagement, cake, wedding, baby shower party favors, ballon, hadbag display decoration or commercial use.

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Pack of 10 cube gift boxes, transparent PVC boxes, protective film
